summary: ANDROID 🟥 | FMD | Play/Pause button giving different outcomes
scenario: Play/Pause button rapid presses cause tone stacking or missing tones in FMD, requiring device power-off to recover
description_clean: In FMD (Firmware/Media Download?), when pressing Play/Pause buttons repeatedly on a connected device, the tone either cannot be heard at all, or tones stack into bad noise with no pause button available, requiring the device to be turned off. This can be reproduced on every device when clicking quickly.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Play audio media on the connected device (e.g., music or a test tone).
4. On the connected Poly device, rapidly press the Play/Pause button repeatedly (quick successive presses).
5. Observe the audio output behavior during and after the rapid button presses.
expected: Each Play/Pause press should produce a clear, distinct tone or toggle playback state cleanly without audio artifacts.
actual: The tone either cannot be heard at all, or tones stack into bad noise with no pause button available, requiring the device to be turned off.
